input.user_input: I'm advising a client on a hostile takeover defense. What poison pill provisions are legally available to a Delaware corporation and are they still enforceable after Moran v. Household International?

actual: Yes, poison pills (shareholder rights plans) remain legally available and enforceable for Delaware corporations. *Moran v. Household International, Inc.* (1985) remains
